description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Container Image Deployment CI (ML stack) that triggers on push to master, ml-deploy-* branches, and specific tags (ml-*), but only if docker/ml.yml or .github/workflows/container-deploy-ml.yml changed. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job to connect to a remote host via SSH, clone or update a repository, set environment variables, start services with Docker Compose, check services are up, and clean up obsolete Docker objects.
